title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm out and about with Mejiro
McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My, look at that, Trainer. What an adorable little
plushie.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Mejiro McQueen's gaze and see
Umamusume plushies on display as prizes for a
claw machine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen seems to have really taken a
shine to them. She stares intently.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
N-no, of course not. I was merely a bit intrigued
by it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Besides, this game looks difficult. I wouldn't be
able to win.
choice_data_list: Then I'll win it for you.
Then I'll win it for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
